title: Vuba Easihold Gravel Glue 4.1L – Gravel Binder & Resin Stone Glue for Rock, Pebbles & Mulch, Pour On Water-Based Adhesive for Garden Paths, Patios & Borders, Weather Resistant, Pet Safe, 10m²
features: Fix Loose Gravel in Minutes – No Mixing Required - Simply pour or spray directly onto your surface. Unlike concentrates or resins, this ready-to-use gravel glue works straight from the bottle, saving time and effort while delivering a strong, reliable hold.

Strong, Clear & Long-Lasting Hold - Locks stones, pebbles, and gravel firmly in place without changing their natural look. Dries clear and resists movement, erosion, and mess even in heavy rain and daily use.
Designed for Real Outdoor Use - Perfect for garden paths, patios, borders, and decorative areas. Creates a durable, weather-resistant surface that stays neat all year round with minimal maintenance.
Safe for Families, Pets & Plants - Water-based, non-toxic formula that’s safe to use around children, pets, and garden environments without harsh chemicals.
Faster, Easier Alternative to Resin Systems - No complicated mixing ratios or specialist tools. Just apply and go – ideal for DIY users who want professional-looking results without the hassle.
